admin-bar.name: Admin Bar Editor
admin-bar.short_description: Customize your WordPress Admin Toolbar by adding, hiding, or modifying menu items. Set visibility by user roles and rearrange with drag-and-drop.

loginfy.name: Loginfy
loginfy.short_description: Customize every element of your WordPress login page. Enjoy responsive design, advanced options, and real-time previews for unique login experiences.

rolemaster-suite.name: RoleMaster Suite
rolemaster-suite.short_description: User Role Editor plugin for WordPress that allows website administrators with the ability to fine-tune user roles and capabilities with precision.

adminify-activity-logs.name: Activity Logs
adminify-activity-logs.short_description: Enhance WP Adminify with detailed activity tracking. Monitor user actions, view logs, track changes, widgets, menus, comments, attachments, and more.

adminify-header-footer-scripts.name: Header & Footer Scripts
adminify-header-footer-scripts.short_description: Easily add custom scripts to your WordPress site's header or footer using an intuitive user interface. Perfect for analytics, custom CSS, and more.

adminify-admin-columns.name: Admin Columns Editor
adminify-admin-columns.short_description: Customize admin columns effortlessly. Add, remove, or reorder columns for any post type. Integrates easily with WooCommerce, ACF, Pods, and Metabox.

adminify-google-pagespeed.name: Google Pagespeed
adminify-google-pagespeed.short_description: Track webpage speed from your dashboard with Google Pagespeed Insights. Get mobile and desktop reports, view history, and manage access by user roles.

adminify-sidebar-generator.name: Sidebar Generator
adminify-sidebar-generator.short_description: Create unlimited custom sidebars with WP Adminify. Requires the Classic Widgets plugin. Easily name, rearrange, manage and delete all your sidebars.

adminify-quick-circle-menu.name: Quick Menu
adminify-quick-circle-menu.short_description: Adminify Quick Menu - bottom right position for nagivating Menus quickly
